rewritten_requirements: The system shall allow a user to create an account.
The system shall allow a user to log in after they have created an account.
The system shall allow a user to apply for a visa after they have logged in.
The system shall allow a user to view the status after they have applied for a visa.
The system shall allow a user to check the status after they have viewed it.
The system shall allow a user to cancel an application after they have logged in.
The system shall allow a user to modify their details after they have logged in.
The system shall allow a user to view their details after they have logged in.
The system shall allow a user to view the purpose of the application after they have logged in.
The system shall allow a user to give feedback after they have checked the status.
The system shall allow a user to log out after they have modified their details, viewed their details, given feedback, or completed a status update.

source_extracted_requirements.requirement: A user can create an account.
source_extracted_requirements.evidence_quote: A person can start by creating an account or by logging in.

source_extracted_requirements.requirement: A user can log in after creating an account.
source_extracted_requirements.evidence_quote: If they create an account first, they can then log in.

source_extracted_requirements.requirement: After logging in, a user can apply for a visa.
source_extracted_requirements.evidence_quote: After logging in, they can apply for a visa, view the status, check the status, cancel the application, modify their details, view their details, or view the purpose of the application.

source_extracted_requirements.requirement: A user can view the status after applying for a visa.
source_extracted_requirements.evidence_quote: After logging in, they can apply for a visa, view the status, check the status, cancel the application, modify their details, view their details, or view the purpose of the application.

source_extracted_requirements.requirement: A user can check the status after viewing it.
source_extracted_requirements.evidence_quote: If they choose to view the purpose of the application, the documents are checked after that. Based on the document check, the visa is either approved or rejected, and then the status is updated.

source_extracted_requirements.requirement: A user can cancel an application after logging in.
source_extracted_requirements.evidence_quote: If they apply for a visa, they fill in the application and then make the payment. Once the payment is done, the application is accepted and its status is updated.

source_extracted_requirements.requirement: A user can modify their details after logging in.
source_extracted_requirements.evidence_quote: If they apply for a visa, they fill in the application and then make the payment. Once the payment is done, the application is accepted and its status is updated.

source_extracted_requirements.requirement: A user can view their details after logging in.
source_extracted_requirements.evidence_quote: If they apply for a visa, they fill in the application and then make the payment. Once the payment is done, the application is accepted and its status is updated.

source_extracted_requirements.requirement: A user can view the purpose of the application after logging in.
source_extracted_requirements.evidence_quote: If they choose to view the purpose of the application, the documents are checked after that. Based on the document check, the visa is either approved or rejected, and then the status is updated.

source_extracted_requirements.requirement: A user can give feedback after checking the status.
source_extracted_requirements.evidence_quote: If they choose to view the purpose of the application, the documents are checked after that. Based on the document check, the visa is either approved or rejected, and then the status is updated.

source_extracted_requirements.requirement: A user can log out after modifying their details, viewing their details, giving feedback, or completing a status update.
source_extracted_requirements.evidence_quote: If they cancel the application, modify their details, view their details, give feedback, or complete the status update, they then log out.
